title: FudanDISC/SocialAgent
summary: This source is the GitHub repository 'SocialAgent' by FudanDISC, providing a collection of resources for investigating social agents driven by large language models (LLMs). The repository includes a tutorial with slides and a comprehensive, categorized paper list covering individual simulation, scenario simulation (including dialog-driven, task-driven, and software development sub-categories), and society simulation. The overall work is summarized in a connecting survey paper, 'From Individual to Society: A Survey on Social Simulation Driven by Large Language Model-based Agents'.
author: FudanDISC
